system_status.render_status: deployed — v3.1.2 Arabic Master (Optimized) | local v3.2 FUNNEL pending push

ai_receptionist_card.onclick_guard: event.stopPropagation() prevents modal open when interacting with phone

simulator_section.overlay: sim-showcase-overlay div catches all clicks and redirects to #reception-simulator

revenue_hook.purpose: Prospect enters their avg profit per patient — stored in window._qzRevenue — shown in revenue badge after booking

phase_1.name: Real Simulator in Bento Card
phase_1.psychology: Product IS the demo. Zero cognitive distance between promise and proof.

phase_2.name: Showcase Redirect + Revenue Bleed Hook
phase_2.psychology: Loss aversion. Prospect quantifies their OWN money before engaging.

phase_3.name: Live Mini-Dashboard
phase_3.animation: bsDashPulse — 0.6s ease x2 per field update
phase_3.psychology: A-ha coordination moment. CRM updates DURING the conversation.

phase_4.name: Ghost Room FOMO Ticker
phase_4.psychology: Social proof + FOMO. System feels alive and already adopted.

phase_5.name: Voice Note Closer
phase_5.psychology: Premium signal. Very few bots do voice. Kills price objection at $133/mo.

critical_rules: ALWAYS maintain the 8-card grid structure in index.html.
NEVER leave dangling div tags in the services section.
Maintain the Tajawal font and Gold/Teal theme strictly.
Bento simulator IDs use 'bs' prefix — NEVER reuse these for the original simulator.
Original simulator #simulator section must remain visually intact.
event.stopPropagation() must remain on the bento phone container div.
window._qzRevenue must be read by bsUpdateDash() for the revenue badge to show.

completed_steps.step_name: Global Service DB Audit & Syntax Repair
insights: Extra div tags in the grid hierarchy caused visual jumping on refresh.
Missing modal data in ServiceDB led to inactive service cards.
RTL dropdown positioning requires 'right-0' anchoring to avoid heading overlap.
PowerShell string replacement fails on CRLF vs LF mismatch — use File.WriteAllText for safety.
Regex approach with (?s) multiline mode is the only reliable way to replace large HTML blocks.
event.stopPropagation() is critical — without it, clicking the phone input opens the modal.
HTML entity encoding must be used in PowerShell here-strings to avoid injection issues.
Original simulator section preserved 100% visually — only start button + overlay changed.
